parameters.formDescription: Submit a product review for AI-powered sentiment analysis and business insights

parameters.jsCode:
// 5 diverse sample product reviews for testing the full pipeline
const reviews = [
  {
    source: 'manual_test',
    product_name: 'Wireless Noise-Cancelling Headphones Pro X1',
    review_text: 'Absolutely love these headphones! The noise cancellation is incredible — I can focus completely in busy coffee shops. Battery life is impressive at 30+ hours. The only minor issue is they get a bit warm after 2+ hours of continuous wear. Overall a fantastic product that has genuinely improved my daily work life.',
    rating: 4.5,
    reviewer_name: 'TechEnthusiast_Mike',
    review_date: '2026-04-01',
    review_id: 'SAMPLE-001'
  },
  {
    source: 'manual_test',
    product_name: 'SmartFit Fitness Tracker Band v2',
    review_text: 'Very disappointed with this product. The heart rate monitor is completely inaccurate — shows 150bpm when I am just sitting at my desk. The strap broke after only 2 weeks of normal use. I contacted customer service three times and they refused to honor the warranty. Complete waste of money. Do not buy.',
    rating: 1,
    reviewer_name: 'FitnessFanatic_Sarah',
    review_date: '2026-04-02',
    review_id: 'SAMPLE-002'
  },
  {
    source: 'manual_test',
    product_name: 'ErgoMax Office Chair Pro',
    review_text: 'Decent chair for the price. Assembly took about 45 minutes. The lumbar support is adjustable which is great for long sessions. However, the armrests feel cheap and wobble noticeably. The seat cushion loses padding after a few months. Would recommend for occasional home use but not for full-time office work.',
    rating: 3,
    reviewer_name: 'HomeOfficePro_Alex',
    review_date: '2026-04-03',
    review_id: 'SAMPLE-003'
  },
  {
    source: 'manual_test',
    product_name: 'BrewMaster Portable Espresso Maker',
    review_text: 'An absolute game changer for travel! Makes genuinely excellent espresso anywhere — hotel rooms, camping, even the office. Easy to clean and compact enough for my backpack. Had it 8 months with zero issues. My colleagues are constantly jealous during morning meetings. 10 out of 10 would recommend to any serious coffee lover.',
    rating: 5,
    reviewer_name: 'CoffeeLover_Emma',
    review_date: '2026-04-04',
    review_id: 'SAMPLE-004'
  },
  {
    source: 'manual_test',
    product_name: 'RoboClean X500 Robot Vacuum',
    review_text: 'Mixed feelings. The suction power is great and handles pet hair really well. The mapping is accurate and it never gets stuck. However the app disconnects from WiFi every few days and the scheduling feature fails to trigger about 30% of the time. Support acknowledged a known firmware issue but the fix has not arrived in 3 months.',
    rating: 3.5,
    reviewer_name: 'SmartHome_Dave',
    review_date: '2026-04-05',
    review_id: 'SAMPLE-005'
  }
];
return reviews.map(r => ({ json: r }));

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO product_reviews (
  review_id, source, product_name, rating, reviewer_name, review_date, review_text, ingested_at,
  sentiment, sentiment_score, confidence, key_topics, main_praise, main_issue, ai_summary,
  priority, priority_reason, suggested_response, product_insight, tags,
  nps_category, urgency_level, requires_response, action_items, rating_vs_sentiment, star_display,
  analysis_status, analyzed_at, model_used, input_tokens, output_tokens
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.review_id }}', '{{ $json.source }}', '{{ $json.product_name }}', {{ $json.rating }}, '{{ $json.reviewer_name }}',
  '{{ $json.review_date }}', '{{ $json.review_text }}', '{{ $json.ingested_at }}',
  '{{ $json.sentiment }}', {{ $json.sentiment_score }}, {{ $json.confidence }}, '{{ $json.key_topics }}',
  '{{ $json.main_praise }}', '{{ $json.main_issue }}', '{{ $json.ai_summary }}',
  '{{ $json.priority }}', '{{ $json.priority_reason }}', '{{ $json.suggested_response }}',
  '{{ $json.product_insight }}', '{{ $json.tags }}',
  '{{ $json.nps_category }}', '{{ $json.urgency_level }}', {{ $json.requires_response }},
  '{{ $json.action_items }}', '{{ $json.rating_vs_sentiment }}', '{{ $json.star_display }}',
  '{{ $json.analysis_status }}', '{{ $json.analyzed_at }}', '{{ $json.model_used }}',
  {{ $json.input_tokens }}, {{ $json.output_tokens }}
) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
  analyzed_at = VALUES(analyzed_at),
  sentiment = VALUES(sentiment),
  priority = VALUES(priority),
  urgency_level = VALUES(urgency_level);

nodes.name: 💾 Save to Database (MySQL)
nodes.notes:
🔐 Create a MySQL credential named 'MySQL Reviews DB' with your connection details.
The table 'product_reviews' must exist (run the CREATE TABLE script in MySQL Workbench).
